title: Spring Snap Hook Carabiner Clip - Steel Stainless Keyring for Backpack Outdoor Camping Hiking Kid Swing Traveling Fishing, Waterproof Rustproof Strong Durable Multifunctional
features: Material: The spring snap carabiner hooks are made of Stainless Steel 304. They are waterproof, rustproof, corrosion-resistant, strong and durable.
Link Size: M4 /4*40MM length 1.57'' (See detailed figure 2). They include 20 universal spring snap carabiner hooks.

Wide uses: The spring snap hooks can be used for outdoor hiking, fishing, camping, traveling, kid swing, gym, hammock hanging, pet rope, to connect sports bottle, backpack, keyring/keychain, DIY tools etc.
Easy to use: Perfectly quick connect /dis-connect for ropes ,chains,rings,straps.

NOT for CLIMBING: The Spring Snap Hooks cannot be used for safety equipment, such as for rock climbing, mountaineering, ice climbing and high-altitude games or any other activity which could result in bodily injury or property damage.
description: Features: Made of 304 stainless steel, durable and corrosion-resistant for a long-time usage. The carabiner is portable and easy to use. The spring-loaded gate can be opened and closed easily and quickly connected and disconnected. The safety buckle works as double insurance in some important conditions. The Carabiner hooks Clips are ideal not only for outdoor activities, such as camping, fishing, hiking, traveling, etc. It can also be used as a key ring, dog or cat's leash hook, sports bottle hook, etc. in your daily life. Note: For safety reasons, it is recommended not to use them in high-risk activities. Specification: Item: Spring Snap Hooks Carabiner (part with safety buckle) Material: 304 stainless steel M4 Color: Silver Size: 4mm x 40mm / 0.16'' x 1.57'' Load Capacity: 40 kg / 88.1 lbs Package included: 20 Pcs x Stainless Steel M4 Universal Carabiner
